{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"graph TD A["Construction
Application object created, views/providers added"] --> B["Initialization
initialize() called"] B --> C["onBeforeInit
Pre-initialization hook"] C --> D["onInitialize
Synchronous initialization"] D --> E["onInitializeAsync
Async initialization (data loading)"] E --> F["Provider Init
All providers initialize"] F --> G["View Init
All views initialize"] G --> H["Initial Solve
Views perform initial calculations"] H --> I["Initial Render
Main viewport view renders (if AutoRender)"] I --> J["onAfterInit
Post-initialization hook"] J --> K["Running
Application is active"] ","style":"notebook"}
